dashboard.description: Track your budget envelopes and net worth here.

login.title: Log in
login.description: Welcome back to Personal Finance Planner.
login.passwordError: Password must be at least 6 characters.

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Start tracking your budget and net worth.
register.passwordError: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.registeredDescription: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.

create.title: Create your household
create.description: A household groups your budget and net worth data and can be shared with others later.
create.name: Household name

budget.noEnvelopesDescription: Create your first envelope to start budgeting.
budget.recurringRulesDescription: Automatic monthly envelope top-ups and cyclical charges.

envelopeForm.description: Envelopes group your budgeted spending, e.g. Groceries or Rent.
envelopeForm.name: Envelope name

transactionForm.newDescription: Log an expense or a top-up for one of your envelopes.
transactionForm.editDescription: Update an expense or top-up for one of your envelopes.
transactionForm.name: Name
transactionForm.nameError: Enter a name for this transaction.
transactionForm.amortizeHint: Records the full payment once, but charges the budget in equal monthly slices.
transactionForm.amortizedMonthsError: Enter a whole number of months between 2 and 120.
transactionForm.amortizePreview: ≈ {{amount}} PLN charged to the budget each month.

bulkFundingForm.title: Fund envelopes
bulkFundingForm.description: Top up several envelopes at once, either as a one-time payment or as new monthly recurring rules.
bulkFundingForm.noEnvelopesDescription: Create an envelope first, then come back to fund several at once.
bulkFundingForm.name: Name
bulkFundingForm.nameError: Enter a name for this funding.
bulkFundingForm.dayOfMonthDescription: Each recurring rule will run every month on this day (1-28).
bulkFundingForm.amountError: Enter an amount greater than 0 for every selected envelope.
bulkFundingForm.partialSaveNote: ({{count}} envelope(s) were already funded before this error.)

recurringRuleForm.description: Automatically top up or charge an envelope every month.
recurringRuleForm.name: Name
recurringRuleForm.nameError: Enter a name for this rule.
recurringRuleForm.dayOfMonthDescription: Runs every month on this day (1-28, to keep every month valid).

transferForm.newDescription: Move funds from one envelope to another.
transferForm.editDescription: Update a movement between two budget envelopes.

envelopeHistory.subtitle: Transactions and transfers recorded in {{month}}.
envelopeHistory.activityDescription: Events that changed this envelope during the selected month.
envelopeHistory.noActivity: No activity recorded for this month.
envelopeHistory.deleteConfirm: Delete this {{kind}}? This cannot be undone.
envelopeHistory.amortizedPaymentNote: {{name}} · spread over the amortization window; does not reduce this month’s budget directly

history.title: History
history.subtitle: All transactions and transfers across every envelope in {{month}}.
history.allOperationsDescription: Every top-up, expense, and transfer recorded this month.
history.noActivity: No activity recorded for this month.
history.deleteConfirm: Delete this {{kind}}? This cannot be undone.

netWorth.title: Net worth
netWorth.subtitle: Manual account valuations as of {{date}}.
netWorth.totalNetWorthDescription: Liabilities are subtracted from the total.
netWorth.unconvertedNotice: Some accounts have no exchange rate set — their amount is included unconverted above.
netWorth.noAccountsDescription: Create an account, then add a manual valuation snapshot.

netWorthTimeline.title: Net worth over time
netWorthTimeline.subtitle: Account balances at the end of each month, converted to {{currency}}.

accountForm.title: New asset account
accountForm.description: Add a bank account, investment account, asset, or liability to track net worth.
accountForm.name: Account name

accountHistory.valuationsDescription: Every dated snapshot recorded for this account.
accountHistory.deleteValuationConfirm: Delete this valuation? This cannot be undone.
accountHistory.holdingsDescription: Individual stocks, ETFs, or funds held in this account.

holdingForm.title: New holding
holdingForm.description: Track a specific stock, ETF, or fund held within this investment account.
holdingForm.name: Name

holdingHistory.positionDescription: Derived from all buy/sell transactions to date.
holdingHistory.transactionsDescription: Every buy/sell event recorded for this holding.
holdingHistory.deleteTransactionConfirm: Delete this transaction? This cannot be undone.

holdingTransactionForm.newDescription: Log a buy or sell event for this holding.
holdingTransactionForm.editDescription: Update a buy or sell event for this holding.
holdingTransactionForm.priceError: Enter a price of 0 or more.

valuationForm.newDescription: Record a dated snapshot of an account's value to update net worth.
valuationForm.editDescription: Update this dated snapshot of an account's value.
valuationForm.noAccountsDescription: Create an account first, then add a valuation.
valuationForm.valueError: Enter a value of 0 or more.

rates.title: Rates
rates.subtitle: Manage the household's base currency and manual exchange rate / commodity price history.
rates.baseCurrencyDescription: Net worth and budget totals are converted into this currency where a rate is available.
rates.exchangeRatesDescription: 1 unit of a currency, expressed in PLN, as of a date.
rates.commodityPricesDescription: Manual price log for reference (e.g. gold).

exchangeRateForm.newDescription: Record how much 1 unit of a currency is worth in PLN, as of a date.
exchangeRateForm.fetchHint: Use "Fetch" to pull the ECB reference rate for this currency and date from frankfurter.dev.

commodityPriceForm.newDescription: Record a dated reference price for a commodity (e.g. gold).
commodityPriceForm.priceError: Enter a price of 0 or more.

householdMembers.title: Household members
householdMembers.membersDescription: Everyone with access to this household's data.
householdMembers.inviteDescription: Generates a link you can share directly — no email is sent automatically.
householdMembers.pendingInvitesDescription: Invites that haven't been accepted yet.

acceptInvite.title: Joining household
acceptInvite.missingToken: This invite link is missing a token.
